overall.description: First-person exploration of a high-end clothing boutique in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks from an exterior marble corridor into a luxury store with holographic price tags, examines shoe and suit displays, and approaches the exit. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon lighting and views of the futuristic city through large windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury shopping corridor with marble flooring and neon lighting

events.description: entering the clothing boutique from the exterior corridor through automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the marble corridor and entering the high-end clothing store

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the store entrance

entered.detail: polished white marble flooring with black veins in the exterior corridor
large glass windows and automatic doors of the clothing boutique
illuminated signage above the store entrance with cyan neon lighting
tall green plants in planters along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a luxurious exterior shopping corridor with polished marble floors and neon lighting. The player approaches the glass storefront of a high-end clothing boutique, passing potted plants and a security guard before entering through automatic doors into the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-end clothing showroom with mannequin displays and city views

events.description: moving deeper into the showroom with dramatic wavy ceiling light strips becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the showroom examining clothing displays on headless mannequins and looking out at the city through large windows

notable_agents.action: shopper in green jacket examining a mannequin display near the entrance

entered.detail: polished dark wood flooring with illuminated strip accents
headless mannequins displaying various outfits on illuminated pedestals
wavy illuminated light strips running along the dark ceiling
large glass wall showing the neon-lit cyberpunk city outside at night
illuminated wooden platforms showcasing clothing items

segments.scene_description: Inside the boutique, the player explores a spacious showroom with dark wooden floors and dramatic ceiling lighting. Headless mannequins display high-end clothing on illuminated pedestals, while a large glass wall reveals the neon-lit cyberpunk city outside. Another shopper browses near the entrance as the player moves deeper into the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoe display wall and seating area with holographic pricing

events.description: approaching the illuminated shoe wall with floating holographic price tags in E$ currency

agents.ego_description: examining the shoe display wall with holographic prices and looking at the seating area near the elevator

notable_agents.action: maintenance worker wearing bunny ears and yellow safety vest standing near the elevator

entered.detail: large wall display with multiple shelves of designer shoes
floating cyan text showing prices in Eurodollars (E$) next to merchandise
round blue marble table with accessories and a glowing display case
cream-colored leather sofa for customers to sit
dark elevator doors with illuminated frame

segments.scene_description: The player moves to the back of the store where a large wall displays various designer shoes with holographic price tags floating in cyan text. A blue marble table with accessories sits near a cream leather sofa, while a maintenance worker with distinctive bunny ears stands by the elevator. The city view is no longer visible as the player faces the interior displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: sales counter and store exit area

events.description: approaching the sales counter where a clerk stands behind the register
reaching the exit door with view of the exterior corridor and city lights

agents.ego_description: walking past the sales counter toward the store exit, passing other shoppers

notable_agents.action: female clerk in white dress standing behind the sales counter with arms crossed
male shopper in suit examining a display with a tablet device

entered.detail: long dark counter with magazines and a monitor, staffed by an NPC
glass exit door leading back to the exterior corridor
view of the neon-lit city street visible through the exit doorway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching the sales counter where a female clerk stands with arms crossed, while a male shopper examines a suit display with a tablet. The player continues toward the exit door, through which the neon-lit cyberpunk city and marble corridor are visible, completing the exploration of the boutique.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a polished exterior corridor into the depths of a luxury cyberpunk boutique and back out toward the city. It begins by gliding across marble floors and past a security guard, passing through automatic glass doors that transition the environment from a bright corridor to a spacious showroom with dark wooden floors and dramatic ceiling lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the store, the view of the neon-lit city through the glass walls fades, shifting focus toward illuminated pedestals with headless mannequins and a back wall of designer shoes featuring floating cyan holographic price tags. The scene then passes a blue marble accessory table and a worker with bunny ears before turning toward the sales counter where a clerk and another shopper stand. Finally, the camera moves toward the exit door, returning the viewer to the sight of the marble corridor and the glowing futuristic cityscape outside.
